Subject: Pre-Earnings Outlook for Quantum Tech Dynamics Ltd.

Dear Investors,

Ahead of the anticipated Q4 earnings release on December 15, 2023, we maintain our positive outlook on Quantum Tech Dynamics Ltd. (UEN: T23QTD9876M). Our analysis suggests a robust performance driven by their innovative AI solutions and strategic partnerships in the region. We forecast an EPS of $1.25, with potential upside should the recently announced government contracts materialize as expected.

Dr. Emily Tan, the Chief Analyst, emphasizes the significance of the upcoming earnings call as a critical indicator of the company's strategic direction. Investors may wish to dial in at +65 6777 1234 for the live webcast.

For further information or to arrange a discussion, please contact our research desk at research@fininsights.sg or reach out to Mr. Alan Lim at +65 6888 5678. Please quote reference ID S7654321Z in your communications.

Best regards,

FinInsights Equity Research Group
